Comment: Professor Beruvides is super chill and does not really care if you miss classes. This class was super easy and there is not a lot of work to do. The TA for my class was very lenient and not a hard grader.

11/10 professor, highly recommend. Class was mostly conceptual but Dr. Mario is very engaging and wise, bringing up a lot of modern and interesting examples. Read the books and go to class. (management of innovation of tech class, ISE 572)
Tags: Get ready to read, Participation matters, Inspirational
